---
title: "Welcome!"
page-layout: full
---

My name is Adrian. This site brings together two parts of my creative work: photography and drawings.

---

```{=html}
<section class="home-carousel" aria-label="Selected photography highlights">
  <div class="home-carousel__viewport">
    <div class="home-carousel__track" id="home-carousel-track"></div>
    <button type="button" class="home-carousel__control home-carousel__control--prev" id="home-carousel-prev" aria-label="Show previous featured image">&#8249;</button>
    <button type="button" class="home-carousel__control home-carousel__control--next" id="home-carousel-next" aria-label="Show next featured image">&#8250;</button>
  </div>
  <div class="home-carousel__dots" id="home-carousel-dots" aria-label="Featured image navigation"></div>
</section>

<script src="_generated/photo-manifest.js"></script>
<script>
const homeCarouselCategories = window.photoCategories ?? [];
const homeCarouselImages = homeCarouselCategories.flatMap((category) =>
  (category.images ?? [])
    .filter((image) => image.on_home === 1)
    .map((image) => ({
      categoryLabel: category.label,
      title: image.title || "",
      src: image.full || image.thumb,
    }))
);

for (let index = homeCarouselImages.length - 1; index > 0; index -= 1) {
  const swapIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * (index + 1));
  [homeCarouselImages[index], homeCarouselImages[swapIndex]] = [
    homeCarouselImages[swapIndex],
    homeCarouselImages[index],
  ];
}

const homeCarouselTrack = document.getElementById("home-carousel-track");
const homeCarouselDots = document.getElementById("home-carousel-dots");
const homeCarouselPrev = document.getElementById("home-carousel-prev");
const homeCarouselNext = document.getElementById("home-carousel-next");
const homeCarouselRoot = document.querySelector(".home-carousel");
let homeCarouselIndex = 0;
let homeCarouselTimer = null;

function setHomeCarouselIndex(index) {
  if (homeCarouselImages.length === 0) {
    return;
  }

  homeCarouselIndex = (index + homeCarouselImages.length) % homeCarouselImages.length;
  homeCarouselTrack.style.transform = `translateX(${-100 * homeCarouselIndex}%)`;

  Array.from(homeCarouselDots.children).forEach((dot, dotIndex) => {
    dot.setAttribute("aria-current", dotIndex === homeCarouselIndex ? "true" : "false");
  });
}

function restartHomeCarouselTimer() {
  if (homeCarouselTimer) {
    window.clearInterval(homeCarouselTimer);
  }
  if (homeCarouselImages.length < 2) {
    return;
  }
  homeCarouselTimer = window.setInterval(() => {
    setHomeCarouselIndex(homeCarouselIndex + 1);
  }, 2500);
}

if (homeCarouselImages.length === 0) {
  homeCarouselRoot?.setAttribute("hidden", "");
} else {
  homeCarouselImages.forEach((image, index) => {
    const slide = document.createElement("figure");
    slide.className = "home-carousel__slide";

    const slideImage = document.createElement("img");
    slideImage.className = "home-carousel__image";
    slideImage.src = image.src;
    slideImage.alt = image.title || `${image.categoryLabel} featured image`;
    slideImage.loading = index === 0 ? "eager" : "lazy";
    slideImage.decoding = "async";

    slide.appendChild(slideImage);
    homeCarouselTrack.appendChild(slide);

    const dot = document.createElement("button");
    dot.type = "button";
    dot.className = "home-carousel__dot";
    dot.setAttribute("aria-label", `Show featured image ${index + 1}`);
    dot.addEventListener("click", () => {
      setHomeCarouselIndex(index);
      restartHomeCarouselTimer();
    });
    homeCarouselDots.appendChild(dot);
  });

  homeCarouselPrev.addEventListener("click", () => {
    setHomeCarouselIndex(homeCarouselIndex - 1);
    restartHomeCarouselTimer();
  });

  homeCarouselNext.addEventListener("click", () => {
    setHomeCarouselIndex(homeCarouselIndex + 1);
    restartHomeCarouselTimer();
  });

  homeCarouselRoot?.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
    if (homeCarouselTimer) {
      window.clearInterval(homeCarouselTimer);
    }
  });

  homeCarouselRoot?.addEventListener("mouseleave", restartHomeCarouselTimer);

  setHomeCarouselIndex(0);
  restartHomeCarouselTimer();
}
</script>

<div class="medium-grid">
  <a class="medium-card" href="photography.html" aria-label="Open the Photography section">
    <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/blogs_josa/creative/photos/animals/thumbnail/IMG_1786.jpg" alt="Photography section preview" loading="lazy">
    <div class="medium-card__body">
      <div class="medium-card__title">Photography</div>
      <p class="medium-card__copy">Landscapes, animals, city scenes, and experiments with the camera.</p>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a class="medium-card" href="drawings.html" aria-label="Open the Drawings section">
    <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/blogs_josa/creative/drawings/graphite/thumbnail/2022-05-28_100344.jpg" alt="Drawings section preview" loading="lazy">
    <div class="medium-card__body">
      <div class="medium-card__title">Drawings</div>
      <p class="medium-card__copy">Graphite sketches, watercolour work, and other drawing-based studies.</p>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>
```
